name: loupe
description: One canonical, sourced page per GLP-1 / cardiometabolic drug — real acquisition cost, live FDA shortage status, verbatim label facts, and same-class alternatives. Agent-native.
disclaimer: Not medical advice. loupe is not affiliated with the FDA, NLM, or CMS. Drug-PRODUCT reference data only — zero PHI.
provenance: Every datum carries {source, source_url, as_of, cache}; cache=cached means from the build-time snapshot.
guardrails: Cost ≠ copay (NADAC is acquisition cost, not patient out-of-pocket).
FAERS counts are spontaneous reports, not incidence rates.
Label text is quoted verbatim with source + as-of date.
Same-class alternatives are informational and clinician-gated.
sources: CMS Medicare Part D Spending by Drug
